title: rake
html:
rake

File Read

The file is actually parsed and the first wrong line is returned in an error message.

rake -f /path/to/input-file

Inherit

This allows to run Ruby code (`...`).

rake -p '...'
excerpt: rake File Read The file is actually parsed and the first wrong line is returned in an error message. rake -f /path/to/input-file Inherit This allows to run Ruby code (`...`). rake -p '...'
